text: Hey Amanda just checking in, how are you doing over there?
I'm good Dad! Busy with work but managing. How's Mom?
She's fine, nagging me as usual 😄 Call us this weekend yeah?
Manda you good? Haven't heard from you since Tuesday 😕
Yes mom lol I've just been slammed with work. I'm fine I promise
Ok ok just checking. Call me this weekend ❤️
hey are we still doing our sunday call or nah
yes omg i was just about to text you. 3pm your time?
perfect. don't be late lol
Ejima! Did you catch the Arsenal match? Ada fell asleep before halftime lol
Ha! What a finish though. How's Ada and Chisom? Tell my niece her uncle says hi 🙂
They're great. Chisom keeps asking for uncle Amanda's beats haha. Come down to Atlanta soon, we'll do jollof 🙂
hey u good? haven't heard from u in a min 👀
omg yes just been swamped lol been working on that bridge we talked about tho 🎵
say less send it when u ready, been thinking about adding some keys to it anyway
yo amanda you good? haven't heard from you in a min
omg yes sorry been swamped lol - you finish that beat you were working on??
just sent it to your email, tell me what you think when you get a sec 🔥
Bro the bridge on Lagos Sunset still feels wide. Can you tighten before teaser goes out?
Copy. I will bounce a tighter master after gym tomorrow.
Take 3 uploaded. Bridge sits better. Check WhatsApp audio before you lock distro metadata.
Teaser copy should reference take 3 or fans will think the snippet is stale.
Heard it. Take 3 is the one. Ignore the old shared-folder export note if you still see take 1 in there.
On it. Release stays Nov 13. Mailchimp sketch targets Nov 12 evening.
Bruv the mixdown on Enugu Nights is sounding massive.
Appreciate it DJ Sage, let's master it next week.
Amanda can you send the Q4 audit scope doc for Ashdale?
On it Marcus, emailing the SOW this afternoon.
Bro don't forget Chisom's birthday next weekend!
Already got her gift, see you in Atlanta.
